---
mode: "agent"
tools: ["codebase"]
description: "Scaffold a new React component with tests following project rules"
---

#file:src/features/
Please generate:
- A feature folder `<FeatureName>/`
- `index.tsx` component with props interface
- `__tests__` file with at least one unit test
- Use hooks, naming, code style, and test rules from project standards (see #file:../../.vscode/rules/copilot-rules-general.md and copilot-rules-testing.md)
